name: Crackle Cackle Crunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour water into a pan until it is about an inch deep and bring to a boil.
2. Break the chocolate into pieces and put into a heatproof bowl.
3. Place the bowl in the pan until the chocolate has melted, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir the corn syrup into the melted chocolate.
5. Add the cereal and spoon into cupcake liners.
6. Leave to set.
